scope: Campaign dashboard, community agent, brand guard, sales chatbot, agent exam integrity

post_2_sync.source: User manually published Community Post #2 in Israeli Facebook group

critical_fixes.fix: Disabled automatic Graph API publishing and removed page fallback. Community posts are now manual-only and can only be marked as published after manual posting.
Enforced both WhatsApp numbers, all 3 Israeli legal ownership solutions, and explicit BDO mention for Filipino content.
Removed PHP/USD exposure from Hebrew rule-based responses and converted Israeli-facing financial responses to shekel-only wording.
Replaced Blueprint-linked video asset in Panglao Prime Villas page with villa-overview.mp4.
Removed forbidden 'guaranteed' wording from publishable post data and community post data.
Removed Blue Group / Blueprint context from CMO identity prompt to maintain strict Blue Everest separation.

agent_exams_local.note: Local mode validates exam integrity. Live API exam was not run because it would dispatch 1000 agent calls.

remaining_open_items.item: Meta billing/delivery and metrics checks in tasks_content.json

remaining_open_items.reason: Would require a running local server and 1000 live agent dispatches/API calls.
